findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name AntiSamy - Allowlisted dangerous attributes
 * @description Find attribute validation patterns in MagicSAXFilter or DOM scanner that may allow dangerous attributes
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/antisamy-dangerous-attr-bypass
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-079
 */

import java

// Look for places where attributes are validated and potentially passed through
from MethodCall mc
where
  (mc.getMethod().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("org.owasp.validator.html.scan", "MagicSAXFilter") or
   mc.getMethod().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("org.owasp.validator.html.scan", "AntiSamyDOMScanner")) and
  (mc.getMethod().hasName("isValidAttribute") or
   mc.getMethod().hasName("allowAttribute") or
   mc.getMethod().hasName("processAttribute") or
   mc.getMethod().hasName("startElement") or
   mc.getMethod().hasName("checkAttribute"))
select mc, "Attribute validation call: " + mc.getMethod().getName() + " in " + mc.getMethod().getDeclaringType().getName()
findings.hypothesis: Attribute validation bypass that allows dangerous HTML attributes like event handlers

message.text: Attribute validation call: startElement in MagicSAXFilter

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name AntiSamy - URL/URI validation patterns
 * @description Find patterns where URL attributes are validated that might allow javascript: or data: URI schemes
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/antisamy-uri-validation
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-079
 */

import java

// Find URL/URI validation in URIUtils
from Method m
where
  m.getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("org.owasp.validator.html.util", "URIUtils") or
  (m.getDeclaringType().getPackage().hasName("org.owasp.validator.html.scan") and
   m.getName().toLowerCase().matches("%url%"))
select m, "URI validation method: " + m.getName() + " in " + m.getDeclaringType().getName()
findings.hypothesis: javascript: or data: URI bypass in URL validation

message.text: URI validation method: normalize in URIUtils
URI validation method: resolveAsString in URIUtils
URI validation method: createFileURL in URIUtils
URI validation method: <clinit> in URIUtils

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name AntiSamy - String replacement or regex patterns for sanitization
 * @description Find regex or string replacement patterns that might be bypassable
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/antisamy-regex-bypass
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-079
 */

import java

// Find regex patterns used for filtering/validation
from StringLiteral sl
where
  sl.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().getPackage().getName().matches("org.owasp.validator%") and
  (sl.getValue().matches("%javascript%") or
   sl.getValue().matches("%expression%") or
   sl.getValue().matches("%script%") or
   sl.getValue().matches("%data:%") or
   sl.getValue().matches("%vbscript%") or
   sl.getValue().matches("%on%=%") or
   sl.getValue().matches("%style%"))
select sl, "Security-relevant regex/string in: " + sl.getEnclosingCallable().getName() + " - value: '" + sl.getValue() + "'"
findings.hypothesis: Regex bypass in sanitization logic

message.text: Security-relevant regex/string in: InternalPolicy - value: 'style'

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name AntiSamy - URL scheme validation bypass
 * @description Check if URIUtils properly validates against javascript: and data: URI schemes
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/antisamy-url-scheme-bypass
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-079
 */

import java

// Find all string literals and comparisons in URIUtils related to scheme validation
from CompilationUnit cu, StringLiteral sl
where
  cu.getPackage().hasName("org.owasp.validator.html.util") and
  cu.hasName("URIUtils") and
  sl.getCompilationUnit() = cu
select sl, "URIUtils string literal: '" + sl.getValue() + "' in method: " + sl.getEnclosingCallable().getName()
findings.hypothesis: javascript: or data: URI scheme bypass in URIUtils

message.text: URIUtils string literal: 'file:///' in method: <clinit>
URIUtils string literal: '/' in method: <clinit>
URIUtils string literal: '.' in method: <clinit>
URIUtils string literal: '..' in method: <clinit>
URIUtils string literal: './' in method: resolveAsString
URIUtils string literal: 'unknown protocol: ' in method: resolveAsString
URIUtils string literal: '' in method: normalize
URIUtils string literal: 'invalid absolute URL: ' in method: normalize

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name AntiSamy - Attribute URL validation in DOM scanner
 * @description Examine how the DOM scanner validates URL-type attributes and what schemes are allowed/blocked
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/antisamy-dom-url-validation
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-079
 */

import java

// Find all string literals in Attribute.java and AntiSamyDOMScanner processAttributes
from StringLiteral sl
where
  (sl.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("org.owasp.validator.html.model", "Attribute") or
   (sl.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("org.owasp.validator.html.scan", "AntiSamyDOMScanner") and
    sl.getEnclosingCallable().getName().matches("%ttribute%")))
select sl, "Attribute/processAttributes string: '" + sl.getValue() + "' in: " + sl.getEnclosingCallable().getName()
findings.hypothesis: URL attribute validation allows javascript: or data: URIs

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name AntiSamy - CSS url() function handling - potential javascript/data URI bypass
 * @description Examine how CSS url() values are validated - looking for cases where javascript: or data: URIs in CSS url() might pass through
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/antisamy-css-url-bypass
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-079
 *       external/cwe/cwe-116
 */

import java

// Find all method calls related to CSS URI/URL validation in CssHandler and CssValidator
from Method m
where
  m.getDeclaringType().getPackage().getName().matches("org.owasp.validator.css") and
  (m.getName().toLowerCase().matches("%url%") or
   m.getName().toLowerCase().matches("%uri%") or
   m.getName().toLowerCase().matches("%import%") or
   m.getName().toLowerCase().matches("%scheme%") or
   m.getName() = "property" or
   m.getName() = "isValidProperty" or
   m.getName() = "lexicalValueToString")
select m, "CSS URL/property method: " + m.getName() + " in " + m.getDeclaringType().getName() + " at line " + m.getLocation().getStartLine()
findings.hypothesis: CSS url() function allows javascript: or data: URI bypass

message.text: CSS URL/property method: property in CssHandler at line 540
CSS URL/property method: importStyle in CssHandler at line 286
CSS URL/property method: getImportedStylesheetsURIList in CssHandler at line 222
CSS URL/property method: lexicalValueToString in CssValidator at line 329
CSS URL/property method: isValidProperty in CssValidator at line 83
CSS URL/property method: parseImportedStylesheets in CssScanner at line 261
CSS URL/property method: getCleanStylesheetWithImports in CssScanner at line 240

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name AntiSamy - CSS SAC_URI handling in lexicalValueToString
 * @description Check if SAC_URI type is properly validated before being included in output
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/antisamy-css-sac-uri-handling
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-079
 *       external/cwe/cwe-116
 */

import java

// Find all references to SAC_URI, SAC_FUNCTION and related CSS URI constants
from FieldAccess fa
where
  fa.getField().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("org.w3c.css.sac", "LexicalUnit") and
  fa.getField().getName().matches("SAC_URI%") or
  fa.getField().getName().matches("SAC_FUNCTION%") or
  fa.getField().getName().matches("SAC_STRING%") or
  fa.getField().getName() = "SAC_ATTR"
select fa, "CSS LexicalUnit constant: " + fa.getField().getName() + " in: " + fa.getEnclosingCallable().getName() + " (" + fa.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().getName() + ") line " + fa.getLocation().getStartLine()
findings.hypothesis: SAC_URI type in lexicalValueToString not properly validated, allowing bypass

message.text: CSS LexicalUnit constant: SAC_STRING_VALUE in: lexicalValueToString (CssValidator) line 356
CSS LexicalUnit constant: SAC_URI in: lexicalValueToString (CssValidator) line 363
CSS LexicalUnit constant: SAC_ATTR in: lexicalValueToString (CssValidator) line 387
CSS LexicalUnit constant: SAC_FUNCTION in: lexicalValueToString (CssValidator) line 390

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name AntiSamy - Dangerous CSS getStringValue usage
 * @description Find where CSS LexicalUnit.getStringValue() is called and the result used without validation
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/antisamy-css-getstring-unvalidated
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-079
 *       external/cwe/cwe-116
 */

import java

// Find calls to getStringValue() on LexicalUnit in CSS classes
from MethodCall mc
where
  mc.getMethod().hasName("getStringValue") and
  mc.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().getPackage().getName().matches("org.owasp.validator.css")
select mc, "getStringValue() call in: " + mc.getEnclosingCallable().getName() + " (" + mc.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().getName() + ") line " + mc.getLocation().getStartLine()
findings.hypothesis: CSS LexicalUnit getStringValue() result used without URI scheme validation

message.text: getStringValue() call in: parseStyleDeclaration (CssParser) line 71
getStringValue() call in: lexicalValueToString (CssValidator) line 359
getStringValue() call in: lexicalValueToString (CssValidator) line 365

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name AntiSamy - SAC_URI getStringValue without scheme validation
 * @description In lexicalValueToString, when handling SAC_URI type, getStringValue() result is included
 *              in output without checking the URI scheme for dangerous values like javascript: or data:
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/antisamy-css-uri-no-scheme-check
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-079
 *       external/cwe/cwe-116
 */

import java

// Find the SAC_URI case in lexicalValueToString and check what happens with getStringValue()
// Look for the method that handles SAC_URI and what calls happen nearby vs what scheme checking exists

from Method m
where
  m.hasName("lexicalValueToString") and
  m.getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("org.owasp.validator.css", "CssValidator")
select m, "lexicalValueToString method handles SAC_URI (line 363) and SAC_FUNCTION (line 390) - getStringValue() called at line 365 without URI scheme validation. This could allow javascript: or data: URIs to pass through CSS url() values."
findings.hypothesis: SAC_URI in lexicalValueToString passes getStringValue() to output without scheme validation

message.text: lexicalValueToString method handles SAC_URI (line 363) and SAC_FUNCTION (line 390) - getStringValue() called at line 365 without URI scheme validation. This could allow javascript: or data: URIs to pass through CSS url() values.

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name AntiSamy - SAC_FUNCTION handling may allow expression() bypass
 * @description Check if SAC_FUNCTION type (which includes CSS functions like expression()) is properly blocked
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/antisamy-css-function-bypass
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-079
 */

import java

// Find what happens when SAC_FUNCTION is encountered - specifically look for expression() blocking
// Check if getFunctionName() is called and compared against dangerous function names
from MethodCall mc
where
  mc.getEnclosingCallable().hasName("lexicalValueToString") and
  mc.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("org.owasp.validator.css", "CssValidator") and
  (mc.getMethod().hasName("getFunctionName") or
   mc.getMethod().hasName("getStringValue") or
   mc.getMethod().hasName("getParameters") or
   mc.getMethod().hasName("append") or
   mc.getMethod().hasName("toLowerCase") or
   mc.getMethod().hasName("contains") or
   mc.getMethod().hasName("equals") or
   mc.getMethod().hasName("matches"))
select mc, "lexicalValueToString call: " + mc.getMethod().getName() + " at line " + mc.getLocation().getStartLine()
findings.hypothesis: SAC_FUNCTION type in CSS may allow expression() to bypass validation

message.text: lexicalValueToString call: getStringValue at line 359
lexicalValueToString call: getParameters at line 369
lexicalValueToString call: getStringValue at line 365
lexicalValueToString call: append at line 370
lexicalValueToString call: append at line 371
lexicalValueToString call: append at line 374
lexicalValueToString call: append at line 375
lexicalValueToString call: append at line 378
lexicalValueToString call: append at line 379

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name AntiSamy - SVG/MathML namespace confusion in DOM scanner
 * @description Find patterns in AntiSamyDOMScanner where SVG or MathML elements are handled,
 *              which could enable namespace confusion XSS bypass
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/antisamy-svg-namespace-bypass
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-079
 *       external/cwe/cwe-080
 */

import java

// Look for SVG/MathML-related strings or namespace handling in the scanners
from StringLiteral sl
where
  sl.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().getPackage().getName().matches("org.owasp.validator%") and
  (sl.getValue().toLowerCase().matches("%svg%") or
   sl.getValue().toLowerCase().matches("%mathml%") or
   sl.getValue().toLowerCase().matches("%math%") or
   sl.getValue().toLowerCase().matches("%namespace%") or
   sl.getValue().toLowerCase().matches("%xhtml%") or
   sl.getValue() = "http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" or
   sl.getValue() = "http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML")
select sl, "SVG/MathML/namespace string in " + sl.getEnclosingCallable().getName() + " (" + sl.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().getName() + ") line " + sl.getLocation().getStartLine() + ": '" + sl.getValue() + "'"
findings.hypothesis: SVG/MathML namespace confusion enabling XSS bypass

message.text: SVG/MathML/namespace string in <clinit> (Policy) line 138: 'useXHTML'
SVG/MathML/namespace string in getParser (AntiSamySAXScanner) line 207: 'http://xml.org/sax/features/namespaces'

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name AntiSamy - validateValue string matching for CSS url() - allowlist bypass check
 * @description validateValue converts a LexicalUnit to string via lexicalValueToString, then matches
 *              against allowlist strings/regexps. If the allowlist patterns match url(javascript:...) 
 *              or url(data:...), it would pass. Check what happens with URL-type CSS properties.
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/antisamy-validatevalue-url-allowlist
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-079
 *       external/cwe/cwe-116
 */

import java

// Find all field accesses and string literals in validateValue to understand the full logic
from Expr e
where
  e.getEnclosingCallable().hasName("validateValue") and
  e.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("org.owasp.validator.css", "CssValidator") and
  (e instanceof StringLiteral or e instanceof FieldAccess)
select e, "validateValue expr: " + e.toString() + " at line " + e.getLocation().getStartLine()
findings.hypothesis: validateValue allowlist patterns may match dangerous CSS url() values

message.text: validateValue expr: policy at line 310

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name AntiSamy - encodeAndPromoteChildren createTextNode - potential XSS via text node promotion
 * @description The encodeAndPromoteChildren method promotes children to text nodes. 
 *              Check if this could allow script content to be preserved when it shouldn't be.
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/antisamy-encode-promote-children
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-079
 */

import java

// Find all method calls in encodeAndPromoteChildren in AntiSamyDOMScanner
from MethodCall mc
where
  mc.getEnclosingCallable().hasName("encodeAndPromoteChildren") and
  mc.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("org.owasp.validator.html.scan", "AntiSamyDOMScanner")

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name AntiSamy - encodeAndPromoteChildren script tag name check
 * @description In encodeAndPromoteChildren, checks if parent tag is 'script' before encoding.
 *              If other dangerous contexts (like style, svg script) are not checked, bypass is possible.
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/antisamy-encode-promote-tag-check
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-079
 */

import java

// Find all string comparisons in encodeAndPromoteChildren 
from Expr e
where
  e.getEnclosingCallable().hasName("encodeAndPromoteChildren") and
  e.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("org.owasp.validator.html.scan", "AntiSamyDOMScanner") and
  (e instanceof StringLiteral or 
   (e instanceof MethodCall and e.(MethodCall).getMethod().hasName("equals")) or
   (e instanceof MethodCall and e.(MethodCall).getMethod().hasName("equalsIgnoreCase")) or
   (e instanceof MethodCall and e.(MethodCall).getMethod().hasName("contains")) or
   (e instanceof MethodCall and e.(MethodCall).getMethod().hasName("toLowerCase")))
select e, "encodeAndPromoteChildren expr: '" + e.toString() + "' at line " + e.getLocation().getStartLine()
findings.hypothesis: encodeAndPromoteChildren only checks for 'script' tag and misses other dangerous contexts

message.text: encodeAndPromoteChildren expr: '">"' at line 758
encodeAndPromoteChildren expr: '"</"' at line 758

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name AntiSamy - Missing URI scheme validation for CSS url() values
 * @description The CssValidator.isValidProperty method calls lexicalValueToString to convert CSS values
 *              to strings, then passes to validateValue which checks against allowlisted patterns.
 *              However, when a SAC_URI value contains javascript: or data:, lexicalValueToString
 *              outputs 'url(javascript:...)' which may match an allowlist pattern like 'url(...)'.
 *              Check if the allowlist patterns in Property objects permit url() with any scheme.
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/antisamy-css-url-allowlist-bypass
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-079
 *       external/cwe/cwe-116
 */

import java

// Find all calls to getAllowedValue and getAllowedRegexp in CssValidator context
from MethodCall mc
where
  mc.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("org.owasp.validator.css", "CssValidator") and
  (mc.getMethod().hasName("getAllowedValue") or
   mc.getMethod().hasName("getAllowedValues") or
   mc.getMethod().hasName("getAllowedRegexp") or
   mc.getMethod().hasName("getAllowedRegexps") or
   mc.getMethod().hasName("getShorthandRefs") or
   mc.getMethod().hasName("getPattern") or
   mc.getMethod().hasName("getRegExp"))
select mc, "CSS property allowlist access: " + mc.getMethod().getName() + " at line " + mc.getLocation().getStartLine()
findings.hypothesis: CSS allowlist patterns allow url() with dangerous schemes

message.text: CSS property allowlist access: getAllowedValues at line 287
CSS property allowlist access: getShorthandRefs at line 307

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name AntiSamy - recursiveValidateTag - check how text/CDATA nodes are handled
 * @description In recursiveValidateTag, check what happens when a CDATA_SECTION_NODE or TEXT_NODE
 *              is encountered - whether the content is sanitized before being included in output.
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/antisamy-recursive-text-handling
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-079
 */

import java

// Find all string literals and integer comparisons in recursiveValidateTag
from Expr e
where
  e.getEnclosingCallable().hasName("recursiveValidateTag") and
  e.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("org.owasp.validator.html.scan", "AntiSamyDOMScanner") and
  (e instanceof StringLiteral or
   e instanceof IntegerLiteral or
   (e instanceof MethodCall and (
     e.(MethodCall).getMethod().hasName("getNodeType") or
     e.(MethodCall).getMethod().hasName("getNodeName") or
     e.(MethodCall).getMethod().hasName("matches") or
     e.(MethodCall).getMethod().hasName("replaceAll") or
     e.(MethodCall).getMethod().hasName("stripCData") or
     e.(MethodCall).getMethod().hasName("encodeAndPromoteChildren")
   )))
select e, "recursiveValidateTag expr: '" + e.toString() + "' at line " + e.getLocation().getStartLine()
findings.hypothesis: recursiveValidateTag text/CDATA node handling may allow script content through

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name AntiSamy - CSS validateValue - allowlist string matching for url() scheme bypass
 * @description validateValue at line 287 iterates getAllowedValues() and compares via equals().
 *              At line 297 it iterates patterns and matches with regex.
 *              Check if these allowlists/regexps in Policy CSS property definitions permit url(javascript:)
 *              by finding what getAllowedValues returns for URL-type CSS properties and whether
 *              the regex patterns used there could match dangerous url() values.
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/antisamy-css-url-regex-allowlist
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-079
 *       external/cwe/cwe-116
 */

import java

// The key question: in isValidProperty (line 97), lexicalValueToString converts SAC_URI
// to "url(VALUE)" string. This is then passed to validateValue.
// validateValue compares against allowed values (strings) and allowed regexp patterns.
// Find all calls to Pattern.compile() in the CSS/Policy context with url-related patterns.
from MethodCall mc
where
  mc.getMethod().hasName("compile") and
  mc.getMethod().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("java.util.regex", "Pattern") and
  mc.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().getPackage().getName().matches("org.owasp.validator%")
select mc, "Pattern.compile() in " + mc.getEnclosingCallable().getName() + " (" + mc.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().getName() + ") at line " + mc.getLocation().getStartLine()
findings.hypothesis: CSS allowlist regex patterns may permit url(javascript:) or url(data:) values

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name AntiSamy - CSS url() handling in isValidProperty - scheme bypass via lexicalValueToString
 * @description Confirm that when isValidProperty processes a SAC_URI type CSS value,
 *              lexicalValueToString wraps value in url() and passes to validateValue.
 *              validateValue then applies regex allowlist matching. If Policy allows 'url(...)' 
 *              via a broad regex like 'url\(.*\)', javascript:/data: URIs would bypass.
 *              This is the critical XSS bypass in CSS property validation.
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/antisamy-css-sacuri-scheme-bypass-confirm
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-079
 *       external/cwe/cwe-116
 */

import java

// Find the SAC_URI case handler in lexicalValueToString - what does it build?
// Case SAC_URI at line 363: builds "url(" + getStringValue() + ")"
// This output becomes the validated string in validateValue
// The validateValue then checks against allowed values and regexps from Policy CSS property defs

// Find how the url() string is assembled in lexicalValueToString for SAC_URI type
from MethodCall mc
where
  mc.getEnclosingCallable().hasName("lexicalValueToString") and
  mc.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("org.owasp.validator.css", "CssValidator") and
  mc.getMethod().hasName("append")
select mc, "lexicalValueToString append() at line " + mc.getLocation().getStartLine() + 
  " - arg: " + mc.getArgument(0).toString()
findings.hypothesis: lexicalValueToString builds url(VALUE) for SAC_URI without scheme check; validateValue may allow via broad regex

message.text: lexicalValueToString append() at line 370 - arg: getIntegerValue(...)
lexicalValueToString append() at line 371 - arg: ','
lexicalValueToString append() at line 374 - arg: getIntegerValue(...)
lexicalValueToString append() at line 375 - arg: ','
lexicalValueToString append() at line 378 - arg: getIntegerValue(...)
lexicalValueToString append() at line 379 - arg: ')'

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name AntiSamy - CSS SAC_URI in lexicalValueToString - confirmed missing scheme validation
 * @description The lexicalValueToString method in CssValidator handles SAC_URI type at line 363-366.
 *              It calls getStringValue() which returns the raw URI string, then wraps it in url().
 *              There is NO check for dangerous schemes like javascript: or data: before or after.
 *              The result flows into isValidProperty (line 97) which calls validateValue (line 99).
 *              validateValue matches the resulting 'url(VALUE)' against CSS property allowlist patterns.
 *              If a policy's CSS property allows url() values via a pattern matching 'url(...)', 
 *              then javascript: and data: URIs can pass through unblocked.
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/antisamy-confirmed-css-uri-bypass
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-079
 *       external/cwe/cwe-116
 */

import java

// Confirm: No check for dangerous URI schemes in the entire lexicalValueToString method
// by finding the absence of any "javascript", "data", "vbscript" string literals
from Method m
where
  m.hasName("lexicalValueToString") and
  m.getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("org.owasp.validator.css", "CssValidator") and
  not exists(StringLiteral sl |
    sl.getEnclosingCallable() = m and
    (sl.getValue().toLowerCase().matches("%javascript%") or
     sl.getValue().toLowerCase().matches("%data:%") or
     sl.getValue().toLowerCase().matches("%vbscript%") or
     sl.getValue().toLowerCase().matches("%scheme%"))
  )
select m, "CONFIRMED: lexicalValueToString() in CssValidator has NO check for dangerous URI schemes (javascript:, data:, vbscript:). SAC_URI values are passed directly to output via getStringValue() at line 365 wrapped in 'url()' without scheme validation. This enables XSS via CSS url() property values with javascript: or data: URI schemes."
findings.hypothesis: Confirmed: lexicalValueToString in CssValidator lacks URI scheme validation for SAC_URI type

message.text: CONFIRMED: lexicalValueToString() in CssValidator has NO check for dangerous URI schemes (javascript:, data:, vbscript:). SAC_URI values are passed directly to output via getStringValue() at line 365 wrapped in 'url()' without scheme validation. This enables XSS via CSS url() property values with javascript: or data: URI schemes.

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name AntiSamy - AntiSamyDOMScanner CDATA and comment handling bypass
 * @description Check if CDATA sections or HTML comments in the DOM scanner could allow script bypass
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/antisamy-cdata-comment-bypass
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-079
 *       external/cwe/cwe-080
 */

import java

// Find handling of CDATA and comment nodes in DOM scanner
from MethodCall mc
where
  mc.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("org.owasp.validator.html.scan", "AntiSamyDOMScanner") and
  (mc.getMethod().hasName("getNodeType") or
   mc.getMethod().hasName("getNodeValue") or
   mc.getMethod().hasName("getTextContent") or
   mc.getMethod().hasName("createCDATASection") or
   mc.getMethod().hasName("createComment") or
   mc.getMethod().hasName("createTextNode"))
select mc, "DOM node handling: " + mc.getMethod().getName() + " in " + mc.getEnclosingCallable().getName() + " at line " + mc.getLocation().getStartLine()
findings.hypothesis: CDATA or HTML comment handling in DOM scanner allows bypass

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name AntiSamy - Conditional comment regex in scanners
 * @description Check if the conditional comment regex patterns properly block IE conditional comments 
 *              that could enable XSS in older IE browsers
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/antisamy-conditional-comment-bypass
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-079
 *       external/cwe/cwe-080
 */

import java

// Find the conditional comment regex patterns used in scanners
from Field f
where
  f.getDeclaringType().getPackage().getName().matches("org.owasp.validator.html.scan") and
  f.getType().getName().matches("%Pattern%")
select f, "Pattern field in " + f.getDeclaringType().getName() + ": " + f.getName() + " at line " + f.getLocation().getStartLine()
findings.hypothesis: Conditional comment regex incomplete, allowing IE-specific XSS bypass
